metadata.name: Create Board of Directors Financial Report

description: An FP&A director needs to create the financial package for the upcoming quarterly board of directors meeting.

nodes.task_description: Generate all standard financial reports for the quarter (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow Statement).

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates all required reports.

nodes.task_description: Create a summary dashboard with key performance indicators (KPIs) and variance analysis.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a visual dashboard highlighting key financial metrics.

nodes.task_description: Compile all reports and the dashboard into a single presentation deck for the board.

expected_outcome.value: Agent assembles the final board package.
